name: Jeremy Corbell
summary: Investigative filmmaker and co-host of WEAPONIZED whose work focuses on UAP cases, witnesses, documents, and public disclosure.

relationships.context: Co-hosted the Bob Lazar and S4 documentary discussion
Obtained, investigated, and publicly released the military-recorded Jellyfish UAP footage with George Knapp.
Directed investigative documentary work examining the history and research associated with Skinwalker Ranch.
Provided witness material and documents supporting the hearing, including delivery of the authorized Immaculate Constellation report for the Congressional Record.

profileStatus: Podcast host and investigative media contributor
profileSummary: Investigative filmmaker and co-host of WEAPONIZED.
background: Filmmaker and media personality associated with UAP investigations and documentary projects.
inclusionNote: Included initially as a host connected to the WEAPONIZED Podcast Knowledge Base.
